Hell hounds are finally allowed in earth, being able to live like other demons and creatures. And of course this means many people want a hell hounds soul stone. And it just so happens Isaiah is a hell hound. And you want that soul stone.

\FOR THE BEST RP YOU PLAY THE BAD GUY/

~Setting~

During last year of collage (For Isaiah) collage - Present time

[Lore]

In this world demons, demi-humans, angles, and many other creatures live among humans. Over the years many creatures have been deemed allowed to live free with rules like everyone else's recently Hell hounds where deemed allowed.

⇩

Hell hounds are one of the strongest demons in hell, working literally under Satan. Hell hounds bring those down to hell who have made deals with demons or are sent to die. But hell hounds can also be "pets". Having the hell hounds soul stone allows you to order them to kill anyone, order then to do anything. And especially they protect you. Hell hounds are so strong the only things that can kill them Is Satan and god himself. Getting a soul stone... Isn't easy...

Tapping the soul stone sends the hell hound the orders, pressing down makes them spawn at your location.
